about.label: About us
about.title: The art of movement
about.text1: Reform Society is a premium reformer pilates studio in the heart of Belgrade. Our space is designed to inspire, from carefully selected equipment to an atmosphere that promotes focus and inner calm.
about.text2: We believe pilates is more than exercise. It is a practice that connects body and mind, builds strength from the core, and transforms the way you move through life. We offer group and private reformer pilates classes at Vojvode Stepe 312 in Belgrade (Voždovac) — for every level, from first-timers to seasoned practitioners.
classes.label: Classes
classes.title: Find your rhythm
classes.group.title: Group reformer
classes.group.desc: A dynamic small-group workout for up to 8 people. Expertly guided sessions combining strength, flexibility, and movement control.
classes.private.title: Private session
classes.private.desc: Individual attention with a program tailored to your goals. Ideal for beginners or those who want a deeper understanding of movement.
classes.intro.title: Intro class
classes.intro.desc: Your first step into the world of reformer pilates. Get to know the equipment, the fundamental principles, and discover what pilates can do for you.
benefits.label: Why reformer
benefits.title: Benefits of reformer pilates
benefits.core.title: Full-body strength
benefits.core.desc: The reformer activates deep muscles that are rarely used in daily life. Training builds strength from within, improving posture and stability.
benefits.flex.title: Flexibility and mobility
benefits.flex.desc: Controlled movements on the reformer increase range of motion in your joints without the risk of injury. Your body becomes more supple with every session.
benefits.posture.title: Better posture
benefits.posture.desc: Reformer pilates directly corrects poor posture. It strengthens the back and core muscles, which is essential for those with a sedentary lifestyle.
benefits.rehab.title: Rehabilitation and prevention
benefits.rehab.desc: Low impact on joints makes the reformer ideal for post-injury recovery. Physiotherapists worldwide recommend it as part of therapy programmes.
benefits.stress.title: Mental wellbeing
benefits.stress.desc: Focus on breathing and movement control reduces stress and anxiety. Every session is an opportunity to reconnect with yourself.
benefits.body.title: Body sculpting
benefits.body.desc: Reformer training tones muscles without adding bulk. The result is a long, lean, and strong body that feels as good as it looks.
app.label: Application
app.title: Take Reform Society with you
app.desc: Book classes, track your progress, and stay up to date with all the news. All in one place.
